behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Gwillim's examine label, conversation, daily scheduling, ambient activity/monologues, and theft-reaction behavior.
U8P_GWILLIM::look returns a short bark/label when the player examines the NPC: it shows 'Gwillim' if the global flag metGwillim is set, otherwise it shows 'Herdsman'.

U8P_GWILLIM::use is the conversation handler run when the player talks to Gwillim. It constructs a dynamic menu (local3), presents choices via Ask, captures the selected option into local1, and loops through dialogue branches until the 'Farewell.' exit option. Using the greeting sets metGwillim.

U8P_GWILLIM::schedule chooses a U8P_GWILLIM::schedule branch based on FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod, sets gwillimSchedule, and invokes scheduler/movement helpers (METHOD::func143A then METHOD::func133F) to apply or start actions.

U8P_GWILLIM::enterFastArea is triggered when an actor enters Gwillim's fast-update trigger; if alive it clears fast-area refs and dispatches one of three activity utilities based on gwillimSchedule (U8P_GWILLIM::func0398, ::func0A50, ::func10D3).

Activity utilities (U8P_GWILLIM::func0398, ::func0A50, ::func10D3) inspect item frames/positions, optionally request Npc::pathfind, wait for the spawned path process, then either call a monologue (U8P_GWILLIM::func0510, ::func0B93, ::func1216) when no one else is talking or run a spawn/sync fallback when somebodyTalking is true or pathfinding fails.

U8P_GWILLIM::AvatarStoleSomething reacts to stolen items (uword param = item ref): it queries Item::getType; for certain types (engine ids seen in the disassembly) it will, on first occurrence, set stolenOnce, bark a unique warning, and call a helper (U8P_GWILLIM::func02BC). For general qualifying thefts it barks, spawns a timed helper (FREE::func1C19), and calls CALGUARD::guardRespondToCrime unless guardsCalled suppresses the alert.
U8P_GWILLIM::leaveFastArea clears the fast-area reference (resetRef 0x0205) to stop fast-update behavior when the actor leaves the area.
notable_control_flow: U8P_GWILLIM::look: simple conditional on global flag metGwillim to select one of two brief barks; then suspend.

U8P_GWILLIM::use: menu lifecycle — MenuSet/MenuAdd/MenuRemove build local3, Ask captures choice into local1 (SuspendAssign), ConversationLoop dispatches branches via strcmp(local1) until exit ('Farewell.'). metGwillim is set on the greeting path.

U8P_GWILLIM::schedule: if not dead, initializes local values, queries FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod to pick a branch, calls METHOD::func143A and waits; if process_result() true then writes gwillimSchedule = local4 and calls METHOD::func133F.

U8P_GWILLIM::enterFastArea: checks Npc::isDead; if alive resets refs (0x0200/0x0204/0x0205) then reads gwillimSchedule and calls the matching activity utility (U8P_GWILLIM::func0398/U8P_GWILLIM::func0A50/U8P_GWILLIM::func10D3).

Activity utilities: read Item::getFrame or coordinates, loop with increments, and when a threshold is met call Npc::pathfind and suspend to wait; after waiting branch on process_result() and somebodyTalking to choose between direct monologue, speech-sync fallback (METHOD::func15E7), or spawning FREE::func1C19 as a timed helper.

U8P_GWILLIM::AvatarStoleSomething: clears fast-area refs, calls METHOD::func15E7 and suspends, checks Item::getType(param) against several constants, gates first-time reaction by stolenOnce flag, sets stolenOnce when applicable, then uses FREE::func1C19 and CALGUARD::guardRespondToCrime to escalate.
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of the numeric item type constants compared in U8P_GWILLIM::AvatarStoleSomething (0x021D, 0x008F, 0x01C6 in disassembly) — which in-game item categories should trigger the theft response?
Precise timing/behavior of FREE::func1C19 spawns (different parameter values observed) and how they affect later state — are they delay timers, visual effects, or temporary processes?
Exact behavior of U8P_GWILLIM::func02BC (called on the unique first-theft branch) — its role is inferred but not present in the excerpt.
Mapping between FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod return values and gwillimSchedule ids (which period number maps to U8P_GWILLIM::schedule id 0x01/0x02/0x03) is inferred but not explicitly named.
Whether any other scripts modify gwillimSchedule or stolenOnce and how cross-script interactions affect this NPC's behavior timing (external dependencies).

main_function.name: U8P_GWILLIM::look
main_function.purpose: Provide a short examine/label bark for the NPC, selecting between 'Gwillim' and 'Herdsman' based on whether the player has met him (global flag metGwillim).
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player 'looks at' or examines this NPC.

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::use
function_map.role: full conversation/dialogue manager (menu construction, Ask/SuspendAssign, branches)

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: theft reaction handler (inspects stolen item, sets stolenOnce, barks, may call guards)

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::schedule
function_map.role: time-of-day driven U8P_GWILLIM::schedule selection and scheduler/movement invocation

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry trigger: clear refs and dispatch U8P_GWILLIM::schedule-specific activity routine

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::func0398
function_map.role: activity utility for U8P_GWILLIM::schedule branch 1: frame checks, pathfind, spawn/speech orchestration

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::func0510
function_map.role: monologue for U8P_GWILLIM::func0398: picks barks by proximity/random and plays them (uses coords)

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::func0A50
function_map.role: activity utility for U8P_GWILLIM::schedule branch 2 analogous to U8P_GWILLIM::func0398

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::func0B93
function_map.role: monologue for U8P_GWILLIM::func0A50: proximity/random barks about family/flock

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::func10D3
function_map.role: activity utility for U8P_GWILLIM::schedule branch 3 analogous to U8P_GWILLIM::func0398/U8P_GWILLIM::func0A50

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::func1216
function_map.role: monologue for U8P_GWILLIM::func10D3: alternate barks about home and son

internal_calls.purpose: Dispatch U8P_GWILLIM::schedule-1 activity when gwillimSchedule == 0x01 (clear refs then run activity)
Run the monologue after successful pathfinding and speech setup
Run the monologue for U8P_GWILLIM::schedule-2 activity when appropriate
Run the monologue for U8P_GWILLIM::schedule-3 activity when appropriate
Invoke a script-local helper for the unique first-theft reaction (called when a certain item type is stolen and stolenOnce was false)
Conversation branches reference/trigger U8P_GWILLIM::schedule decisions or read U8P_GWILLIM::schedule-related flags (menu content can depend on U8P_GWILLIM::schedule/flags)

external_calls.purpose: Request NPC movement toward an item/target before speaking; spawn and wait for the movement process
Request NPC movement using path id (0x0A observed) before monologue
Request NPC movement before monologue for U8P_GWILLIM::schedule-3
Read positions for proximity checks determining which bark set to U8P_GWILLIM::use
Compute a 3D distance metric used to choose 'near' vs 'far' barks
Prepare/start speech before a bark (speech-queue helper)
Finalize/commit speech and synchronize suspend points after barks
Determine the stolen item's type/category to decide whether and how to react
Spawn a timed helper process (used as a fallback/timer effect when theft occurs or speech is deferred)
Alert/trigger guard AI in response to theft (escalation after barks and spawn)
Query time-of-day to pick a U8P_GWILLIM::schedule branch
Start or prepare a scheduler/movement process used to test/apply the chosen U8P_GWILLIM::schedule
Finalize or apply the chosen U8P_GWILLIM::schedule when the preparatory process returns success
Choose a random bark index within near/far sets

reads.name: metGwillim
reads.likely_effect: Determines which short 'U8P_GWILLIM::look' label and initial greeting/menu is shown (whether player has met Gwillim)

reads.name: guardsCalled
reads.likely_effect: Prevents duplicate guard alerts when a theft is already being handled

reads.name: stolenOnce
reads.likely_effect: Gate for a unique first-theft reaction so it only occurs once

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Prevents interrupting another ongoing conversation; used to pick speech vs spawn fallback

writes.name: stolenOnce
writes.likely_effect: Marked true when a qualifying stolen item is detected to record that the first-time reaction has occurred

writes.name: gwillimSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Records the U8P_GWILLIM::schedule id chosen by U8P_GWILLIM::schedule and drives which activity utility is used on U8P_GWILLIM::enterFastArea

writes.name: metGwillim
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player first uses the greeting branch (so future 'U8P_GWILLIM::look' and conversation initialization reflect that the player has met Gwillim)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Gwillim's examine label, conversation, daily scheduling, ambient activity/monologues, and theft-reaction behavior.
